artifactBrief.audience: Tech-savvy professionals interested in AI tools
artifactBrief.jobToBeDone: Highlight the capabilities and benefits of an AI tools brand to attract potential users and partners
artifactBrief.subjectDomain: AI technology, software tools, innovation, collaboration
artifactBrief.artifactThesis: The SVG hero concept should visually represent the cutting-edge nature of AI tools while emphasizing their practical applications in a professional setting.
styleDirectives: Use clean lines and minimalistic design elements to convey simplicity and efficiency.
Incorporate icons or symbols that represent AI concepts such as neural networks, data flow, or smart algorithms.
Ensure the color scheme is tech-forward with shades of blue and white for a professional look.

fileWrites.contentPreview:
<svg width="1024" height="768" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1024 768"><title>Tech-savvy professionals interested in AI tools - AI technology, software tools, innovation, collaboration</title><desc>The SVG hero concept should visually represent the cutting-edge nature of AI tools while emphasizing their practical applications in a professional setting. Key concepts: AI, tools, innovation, collaboration, technology. Anchors: AI-driven solutions, efficiency gains, data analysis, user-friendly interfaces.</desc>
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="tech-blue" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0D4C8E" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3B8ED0" />
    </linearGradient>
